SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto

Class ManagerIssueReportResponse

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerIssueReportResponse
public class ManagerIssueReportResponse extends Object
Response DTO for GET /manager/issue-reports.

Uses nested DTOs for related entities to avoid recursive JSON serialization.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.AcceptedStateResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of AcceptedState fields for manager views.
